problem.title: Plus One
problem.description: You are given a large integer represented as an integer array digits, where each digits[i] is the ith digit of the integer.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Carry Over
solutions.description: Traverse the digits from right to left, incrementing each digit and propagating any carry. If a digit is less than 9 it absorbs the increment immediately and we return early; otherwise it becomes 0 and carry continues left. If all digits were 9, a new leading 1 must be prepended.
